name: CV About
description: Section 01 — about. Big eyebrow + heading, lede paragraph, then a 3-column grid: day-job copy, client note, and an off-hours list with little SVG icon tiles.

field_schema.label: Anchor id
field_schema.help: HTML id used for nav anchors (default: about).

field_schema.label: Eyebrow
field_schema.help: Mono label above the heading (e.g. 01 · about).

field_schema.label: Lede
field_schema.help: Lead paragraph at top of the grid.

sub_fields.label: Icon
sub_fields.help: laptop = vibecoding, beer = bia hà nội, tv = anime / star trek.

sub_fields.label: Line
sub_fields.help: One-liner shown beside the icon tile.

test_data.heading: Builds things that don't fall over six months later.
test_data.lede: Ten-plus years of writing the kind of code you can come back to. PHP / Symfony / WordPress at the core, React and Next.js on top, and for the last while: a serious push into AI — MCP servers, agent workflows, retrieval, the works.
test_data.day_job_text: Bridging real business stuff with real engineering. I came out of commerce, so I get why the deadline matters and why the invoice has to be right. Then I write the API.
test_data.client_text: Based in Vietnam, but a fully registered Slovak (EU) freelance contractor with EU tax residency. Standard B2B invoicing, no weirdness. Available across SEA and EU hours.

off_items.text: Vibecoding until 4 a.m. — me, the cursor, and one too many tabs open.
Bia Hà Nội on the little blue stool, watching scooters honk past.
Anime, Star Trek, and arguing about which Captain is best (it's Picard).
